generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent rise in localized threats shows why we need expanded powers for our agencies. Remember the 2025 subway incident? It could've been worse if our security forces had more real-time data access. We owe it to our families to give law enforcement the tools they need to keep us safe. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
